## Summary

Adds hover tooltip definitions to non-obvious labels across the Story Ledger, evaluation report, and Revise Queue demo. Labels that authors won't immediately understand (Legal name states, Resolution status, Relational Engines, Foil, Symptom, Cause, Fix direction, Reader effect, Mistake-proofing, etc.) now show a dotted underline and a native `title` tooltip on hover with a plain-English explanation.

Only non-obvious labels get hints — not a Christmas tree.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `components/ledger/StoryLedgerLayers.tsx` — 22 label hints via `LABEL_HINTS` map + `sectionHeaderProps()` helper
- `components/evaluation/CriterionOpportunities.tsx` — 5 diagnostic field tooltips
- `components/revise/ReviseQueueDemo.tsx` — same 5 diagnostic field tooltips

**Does NOT touch:**
- Pipeline, scoring, prompt contracts, schema, API routes, tests
- Labels that are already self-explanatory (Protagonist, Antagonist, Score, etc.)
- Report page (already has a "What does Confidence mean?" explainer block)

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

Minimal — only adds `title` attributes and `cursor: help` + `border-bottom: dotted` styling. No functional changes.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — pure UI presentation, no pipeline/scoring/prompt changes.
